untranslatable_reason: Twin Peaks pattern requires identification of two distinct peaks and the lowest low between them (confirmation line). This multi-bar structural pattern cannot be fully expressed using point-in-time indicator values. The pattern requires: (1) detection of two local highs of similar magnitude, (2) identification of the valley between them, (3) measurement from the right peak's date to the breakdown date below the valley low. The available indicators lack the capability to identify and track these structural components across multiple bars with the required precision. A custom multi-bar pattern detector would be needed for accurate implementation.
